levels.name: DA_LKP
levels.caption: DA_LKP
levels.calculation:
IF 
 (ZN(SUM([DealerActivations])) - LOOKUP(ZN(SUM([DealerActivations])), 1)) / ABS(LOOKUP(ZN(SUM([DealerActivations])), 1)) <0 then -1 
ELSEIF (ZN(SUM([DealerActivations])) - LOOKUP(ZN(SUM([DealerActivations])), 1)) / ABS(LOOKUP(ZN(SUM([DealerActivations])), 1))= 0 then 0 
ELSE 1 END

levels.name: DO_LKP
levels.caption: DO_LKP
levels.calculation:
IF 
(ZN(SUM([DealerOrders])) - LOOKUP(ZN(SUM([DealerOrders])), 1)) / ABS(LOOKUP(ZN(SUM([DealerOrders])), 1)) <0 then -1 
ELSEIF (ZN(SUM([DealerOrders])) - LOOKUP(ZN(SUM([DealerOrders])), 1)) / ABS(LOOKUP(ZN(SUM([DealerOrders])), 1))= 0 then 0 
ELSE 1 END

levels.name: Mail Type Aliased
levels.caption: Mail Type Aliased
levels.calculation:
CASE [SRC]
WHEN "Branded" THEN "Branded-Saturation"
WHEN "Branded Radius" THEN "Radius"
WHEN "DealerRadius" THEN "Radius"
WHEN "Generic" THEN "Generic-Saturation"
END

levels.name: MQ_LKP
levels.caption: MQ_LKP
levels.calculation:
IF 
(ZN(SUM([Count])) - LOOKUP(ZN(SUM([Count])), 1)) / ABS(LOOKUP(ZN(SUM([Count])), 1)) <0 then -1 
ELSEIF (ZN(SUM([Count])) - LOOKUP(ZN(SUM([Count])), 1)) / ABS(LOOKUP(ZN(SUM([Count])), 1))= 0 then 0 
ELSE 1 END

levels.name: Monthly / Weekly View/BDN
levels.caption: Monthly / Weekly View/BDN
levels.calculation:
CASE [Parameters].[Cost Per Call Parameter]

WHEN 'QQ' THEN "Q" + STR(DATEPART('quarter',[Est_IHD],'Monday')) + "'" + RIGHT(STR(DATEPART('year',[Est_IHD],'Monday')),2) 

WHEN 'WW' THEN "Wk "+ str(DATEPART('week',[Est_IHD],'Monday')) + "'" + RIGHT(STR(DATEPART('year',[Est_IHD],'Monday')),2)

WHEN 'MM' THEN  LEFT(DATENAME("month",[Est_IHD]),3) + "'" + RIGHT(STR(DATEPART('year',[Est_IHD],'Monday')),2)
END

levels.name: cpd_mon
levels.caption: cpd_mon
levels.calculation:
IF [Est_IHD] = { FIXED : MAX([Est_IHD])} then "Current"
ELSEIF [Est_IHD] = { FIXED : DATEADD('month',-1,MAX([Est_IHD]) )} then "Previous"
END

levels.name: TC_LKP
levels.caption: TC_LKP
levels.calculation:
IF 
((ZN(SUM([Total_Calls])) - LOOKUP(ZN(SUM([Total_Calls])), 1)) / ABS(LOOKUP(ZN(SUM([Total_Calls])), 1))) <0 then -1 
ELSEIF ((ZN(SUM([Total_Calls])) - LOOKUP(ZN(SUM([Total_Calls])), 1)) / ABS(LOOKUP(ZN(SUM([Total_Calls])), 1)))= 0 then 0 
ELSE 1 END

levels.name: Beam_Status_At_Time
levels.caption: Beam_Status_At_Time

levels.name: KPI_2
levels.caption: KPI_2
levels.calculation:
CASE [Parameters].[KPI List (copy)]
WHEN "MQ" THEN SUM([MailQTY])
WHEN "DO" THEN SUM([DealerOrders])
WHEN "DA" THEN SUM([DealerActivations])
WHEN "OR" THEN sum([DealerOrders])/sum([MailQTY])
WHEN "AR" THEN sum([DealerActivations])/sum([DealerOrders])
WHEN "CPDO" THEN 0.45 *( SUM([MailQTY])/SUM([DealerOrders]) )
END

levels.name: Monthly / Weekly View
levels.caption: Monthly / Weekly View
levels.calculation:
CASE [Parameters].[Cost Per Call Parameter]

WHEN 'QQ' THEN "Q" + STR(DATEPART('quarter',[EST_IHD],'Monday'))

WHEN 'WW' THEN "Week "+ str(DATEPART('week',[EST_IHD],'Monday')) 

WHEN 'MM' THEN LEFT(DATENAME("month",[EST_IHD]),3)

END

levels.name: KPIs 1
levels.caption: KPIs 1
levels.calculation:
CASE [Parameters].[Monthly / Weekly View  (copy)]
WHEN "CNT" THEN SUM([Count])
WHEN "TC" THEN SUM([Total_Calls])
WHEN "RR" THEN SUM([Total_Calls])/SUM([Count])
WHEN "CPC" THEN SUM([Retailer_Cost])/SUM([Total_Calls])
END

levels.name: Monthly / Weekly View /BDN
levels.caption: Monthly / Weekly View /BDN
levels.calculation:
CASE [Parameters].[Cost Per Call Parameter]

WHEN 'QQ' THEN "Q" + STR(DATEPART('quarter',[EST_IHD],'Monday')) + "'" + RIGHT(STR(DATEPART('year',[EST_IHD],'Monday')),2) 

WHEN 'WW' THEN "Wk "+ str(DATEPART('week',[EST_IHD],'Monday')) + "'" + RIGHT(STR(DATEPART('year',[EST_IHD],'Monday')),2)

WHEN 'MM' THEN  LEFT(DATENAME("month",[EST_IHD]),3) + "'" + RIGHT(STR(DATEPART('year',[EST_IHD],'Monday')),2)
END

levels.name: OR_LKP
levels.caption: OR_LKP
levels.calculation:
IF 
(ZN([Order Rate]) - LOOKUP(ZN([Order Rate]), 1)) / ABS(LOOKUP(ZN([Order Rate]), 1)) <0 then -1 
ELSEIF (ZN([Order Rate]) - LOOKUP(ZN([Order Rate]), 1)) / ABS(LOOKUP(ZN([Order Rate]), 1)) = 0 then 0 
ELSE 1 END

levels.name: BST_FLAG
levels.caption: BST_FLAG
levels.calculation:
CASE [Beam_Status_Today]
WHEN 'GROWTH' THEN 'GROWTH'
WHEN 'STANDARD' THEN 'STANDARD'
WHEN 'MANAGED' THEN 'MANAGED'
WHEN 'NO J2' THEN 'STANDARD'
WHEN NULL THEN 'EXCLUDE'
WHEN 'PR' THEN 'EXCLUDE'
WHEN '-' THEN 'EXCLUDE'
END

levels.name: BSAT_FLAG
levels.caption: BSAT_FLAG
levels.calculation:
CASE [Beam_Status_At_Time]
WHEN 'GROWTH' THEN 'GROWTH'
WHEN 'STANDARD' THEN 'STANDARD'
WHEN 'MANAGED' THEN 'MANAGED'
WHEN 'NO J2' THEN 'STANDARD'
WHEN NULL THEN 'EXCLUDE'
WHEN 'PR' THEN 'EXCLUDE'
WHEN '-' THEN 'EXCLUDE'
END

levels.name: AR_LKP
levels.caption: AR_LKP
levels.calculation:
IF 
 (ZN([Activation Rate]) - LOOKUP(ZN([Activation Rate]), 1)) / ABS(LOOKUP(ZN([Activation Rate]), 1)) <0 then -1 
ELSEIF (ZN([Activation Rate]) - LOOKUP(ZN([Activation Rate]), 1)) / ABS(LOOKUP(ZN([Activation Rate]), 1))= 0 then 0 
ELSE 1 END

levels.name: CPDO_LKP
levels.caption: CPDO_LKP
levels.calculation:
IF 
 (ZN([Cost per Dealer Order]) - LOOKUP(ZN([Cost per Dealer Order]), 1)) / ABS(LOOKUP(ZN([Cost per Dealer Order]), 1)) <0 then -1 
ELSEIF (ZN([Cost per Dealer Order]) - LOOKUP(ZN([Cost per Dealer Order]), 1)) / ABS(LOOKUP(ZN([Cost per Dealer Order]), 1)) = 0 then 0 
ELSE 1 END

levels.name: RR_LKP
levels.caption: RR_LKP
levels.calculation:
IF 
(ZN([Resp. Rate]) - LOOKUP(ZN([Resp. Rate]), 1)) / ABS(LOOKUP(ZN([Resp. Rate]), 1)) <0 then -1 
ELSEIF (ZN([Resp. Rate]) - LOOKUP(ZN([Resp. Rate]), 1)) / ABS(LOOKUP(ZN([Resp. Rate]), 1))= 0 then 0 
ELSE 1 END

levels.name: Yoy_Mon
levels.caption: Yoy_Mon
levels.calculation:
IF MONTH([EST_IHD])= MONTH({ EXCLUDE YEAR([EST_IHD]),MONTH([EST_IHD]), [EST_IHD],[Mon_yr] :MAX([EST_IHD])} )
and YEAR([EST_IHD])= YEAR({ EXCLUDE YEAR([EST_IHD]),MONTH([EST_IHD]), [EST_IHD],[Mon_yr] :MAX([EST_IHD])} )
then
"Current Month"
ELSEIF 
MONTH([EST_IHD])= MONTH({ EXCLUDE YEAR([EST_IHD]),MONTH([EST_IHD]), [EST_IHD],[Mon_yr] :MAX([EST_IHD])} )
and YEAR([EST_IHD])= YEAR({ EXCLUDE YEAR([EST_IHD]),MONTH([EST_IHD]), [EST_IHD],[Mon_yr] :MAX([EST_IHD])} )-1 then
"Previous Yr"
END

levels.name: Yoy_Mon
levels.caption: Yoy_Mon
levels.calculation:
IF MONTH([Est_IHD])= MONTH({ EXCLUDE YEAR([Est_IHD]),MONTH([Est_IHD]), [Est_IHD],[Mon_yr] :MAX([Est_IHD])} )
and YEAR([Est_IHD])= YEAR({ EXCLUDE YEAR([Est_IHD]),MONTH([Est_IHD]), [Est_IHD],[Mon_yr] :MAX([Est_IHD])} )
then
"Current Month"
ELSEIF 
MONTH([Est_IHD])= MONTH({ EXCLUDE YEAR([Est_IHD]),MONTH([Est_IHD]), [Est_IHD],[Mon_yr] :MAX([Est_IHD])} )
and YEAR([Est_IHD])= YEAR({ EXCLUDE YEAR([Est_IHD]),MONTH([Est_IHD]), [Est_IHD],[Mon_yr] :MAX([Est_IHD])} )-1 then
"Previous Yr"
END

levels.name: KPI_3
levels.caption: KPI_3
levels.calculation:
CASE [Parameters].[KPI List 2 (copy)]
WHEN "CPDO" THEN 0.45 *( SUM([MailQTY])/SUM([DealerOrders]) )
WHEN "CPDA" THEN 0.45 *( sum([MailQTY])/SUM ([DealerActivations]) )
WHEN "HCPDO" THEN sum([Hughes Cost]) / SUM([DealerOrders])
WHEN "DCPDO" THEN sum([Dealer Cost])/sum([DealerOrders])
WHEN "SAC" THEN (0.45 *( SUM([MailQTY])/SUM([DealerOrders]) ) ) + 210 + 181
END
